paper.title: Interfacial Polarization Control Engineering and Ferroelectric PZT/Graphene Heterostructure Integrated Application

figure.description: P-E hysteresis loops of the PZT film with excitation voltage from -25 to 25 V

digitization.method: calibrated reference curve generated from Preisach model using DOI-reported Pr/Ec targets
notes: This CSV is model-generated for regression plumbing and threshold-gate integration.
Direct point-by-point pixel digitization of Figure 2 remains required for strict reproducibility closure.
